findings.message: New datastore query path 'get_item_by_name()' has no observability (no metric or span). The query is unbounded and could be expensive if Item.name is unindexed.
findings.suggestion: Wrap the query with observability: add a span around the query, record query latency as a metric, and ensure the index on Item.name is documented. Consider adding a metric like 'db_query_latency_ms' labeled with the query type.
